mapper.select: SELECT min(${col}), max(${col}), count(${col}) FROM xeus.${tbl};

SELECT tbl.*, st_asgeojson(tbl._geometry) as geojson, st_x(st_centroid(_geometry)) AS _annox, st_y(st_centroid(_geometry)) AS _annoy
, status.state_cd AS state_cd
,(select wind_avg from xeus.asset_dust where dev_eui = tbl.dev_eui order by time desc limit 1)
,(select wind_max from xeus.asset_dust where dev_eui = tbl.dev_eui order by time desc limit 1)
,(select time from xeus.asset_dust where dev_eui = tbl.dev_eui order by time desc limit 1)
FROM xeus.${tbl} as tbl
LEFT JOIN xeus.asset_status AS status ON tbl.mgr_no = status.mgr_no
AND ${col} in (${val})
AND ST_Intersects(ST_MakeEnvelope(${box}, 5186), _geometry)
AND req_gbn in (${reqGbn})
AND reqst_dat >= #{startDat}
AND reqst_dat <= #{endDat}
AND facility_clscd like '%'||#{facilityClscd}||'%'
AND ((facility_clscd not like 'WIFI%' and facility_clscd not like 'LORA%' and facility_clscd not like 'CCTV%') OR facility_clscd ISNULL)
AND test_yn = 'Y' and evt_nm IS NOT NULL and lower(evt_nm) != 'null' and evt_nm != ''
AND net_nm in ('${netNm}')
AND cable_typ in ('${cableTyp}')
AND mdfy_date like #{mdfyDate}||'%'
AND mdfy_date >= #{mdfyDate} and mdfy_date <= #{endMdfyDate}||'24'
AND dev_eui = #{devEui}
AND app_eui != '375A4B4E00000056'
AND time like #{time}||'%'
AND time >= #{time} and time <= #{endTime}||'24'
AND loc_dat >= #{locDat}
${sortCol} ${sortTyp}
LIMIT ${limit} OFFSET ${offset}

SELECT tbl._gid, st_asgeojson(tbl._geometry) as geojson
, grid_id
FROM xeus.${tbl} as tbl
AND ${col} in (${val})
AND ST_Intersects(ST_MakeEnvelope(${bbox}, 5186), _geometry)
${sortCol} ${sortTyp}
LIMIT ${limit} OFFSET ${offset}

SELECT * FROM xeus.asset_cctv_preset
WHERE cctv_mgr_no = #{cctvMgrNo}
ORDER BY ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{tmx}::numeric, #{tmy}::numeric), 5186) <-> ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(dir_x, dir_y), 5186)
LIMIT 1
